endpoints.name: GET /v2/infoTypes
endpoints.description: Returns a list of the sensitive information types that DLP API supports. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/infotypes-reference to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets a stored infoType. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-stored-infotypes to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a stored infoType. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-stored-infotypes to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates the stored infoType by creating a new version. The existing version will continue to be used until the new version is ready. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-stored-infotypes to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:activate
endpoints.description: Activate a job trigger. Causes the immediate execute of a trigger instead of waiting on the trigger event to occur.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running DlpJob. The server makes a best effort to cancel the DlpJob, but success is not guaranteed. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/inspecting-storage and https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/compute-risk-analysis to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:finish
endpoints.description: Finish a running hybrid DlpJob. Triggers the finalization steps and running of any enabled actions that have not yet run.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{name}:hybridInspect
endpoints.description: Inspect hybrid content and store findings to a trigger. The inspection will be processed asynchronously. To review the findings monitor the jobs within the trigger.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/content:deidentify
endpoints.description: De-identifies potentially sensitive info from a ContentItem. This method has limits on input size and output size. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/deidentify-sensitive-data to learn more. When no InfoTypes or CustomInfoTypes are specified in this request, the system will automatically choose what detectors to run. By default this may be all types, but may change over time as detectors are updated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/content:inspect
endpoints.description: Finds potentially sensitive info in content. This method has limits on input size, processing time, and output size. When no InfoTypes or CustomInfoTypes are specified in this request, the system will automatically choose what detectors to run. By default this may be all types, but may change over time as detectors are updated. For how to guides, see https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/inspecting-images and https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/inspecting-text,
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/content:reidentify
endpoints.description: Re-identifies content that has been de-identified. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/pseudonymization#re-identification_in_free_text_code_example to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/deidentifyTemplates
endpoints.description: Lists DeidentifyTemplates. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-templates-deid to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/deidentifyTemplates
endpoints.description: Creates a DeidentifyTemplate for reusing frequently used configuration for de-identifying content, images, and storage. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-templates-deid to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/dlpJobs
endpoints.description: Lists DlpJobs that match the specified filter in the request. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/inspecting-storage and https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/compute-risk-analysis to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/dlpJobs
endpoints.description: Creates a new job to inspect storage or calculate risk metrics. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/inspecting-storage and https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/compute-risk-analysis to learn more. When no InfoTypes or CustomInfoTypes are specified in inspect jobs, the system will automatically choose what detectors to run. By default this may be all types, but may change over time as detectors are updated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/image:redact
endpoints.description: Redacts potentially sensitive info from an image. This method has limits on input size, processing time, and output size. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/redacting-sensitive-data-images to learn more. When no InfoTypes or CustomInfoTypes are specified in this request, the system will automatically choose what detectors to run. By default this may be all types, but may change over time as detectors are updated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/infoTypes
endpoints.description: Returns a list of the sensitive information types that DLP API supports. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/infotypes-reference to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/inspectTemplates
endpoints.description: Lists InspectTemplates. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-templates to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/inspectTemplates
endpoints.description: Creates an InspectTemplate for reusing frequently used configuration for inspecting content, images, and storage. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-templates to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/jobTriggers
endpoints.description: Lists job triggers. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-job-triggers to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/jobTriggers
endpoints.description: Creates a job trigger to run DLP actions such as scanning storage for sensitive information on a set schedule. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-job-triggers to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/storedInfoTypes
endpoints.description: Lists stored infoTypes. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-stored-infotypes to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/storedInfoTypes
endpoints.description: Creates a pre-built stored infoType to be used for inspection. See https://cloud.google.com/dlp/docs/creating-stored-infotypes to learn more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
